title: Marks & Spencer India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Marks & Spencer India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!
